prompt: Necesito crear un endpoint GET /users/{userId}/last-location que retorne la última ubicación de un usuario. El endpoint va en el microservicio ms-geolocation. Debería buscar en la tabla location usando el userId y retornar lat, lon, ciudad y código de país.

assertions.name: controller-interface-exists
assertions.text: Output contains a public interface for the Controller (not only a class)

assertions.name: restcontroller-impl-exists
assertions.text: Output contains @RestController annotation on the implementation class

assertions.name: transactional-in-service
assertions.text: Output contains @Transactional(rollbackFor = Exception.class) in the service layer

assertions.name: mapstruct-instance-pattern
assertions.text: Output uses MapStruct INSTANCE singleton pattern (INSTANCE = Mappers.getMapper(...))

assertions.name: response-dto-is-record
assertions.text: Output uses Java record for the response DTO

assertions.name: no-entity-outside-persistence
assertions.text: Output does not pass Entity objects to the service or presentation layer (entity stays in persistence)

assertions.name: persistence-port-used
assertions.text: Service implementation injects a *Persistence interface (port), not a Repository directly
